name: Lumix (DJ)
description: '''Luca Michlmayr''' (born 23 July  2002), known by the stage name '''Lumix''' (stylized as '''LUM!X''' or '''Lum!x'''), is an Austrian-Italian DJ and music producer based in Italy. He is best-known for the hits "[[Monster (Lum!x and Gabry Ponte song)|Monster]]" (with [[Gabry Ponte]]), "The Passenger" (with Ponte & D.T.E. feat. Mokaby), and "[[Thunder (Gabry Ponte, Lum!x and Prezioso song)|Thunder]]" (with Ponte and [[Giorgio Prezioso|Prezioso]]). He represented [[Austria in the Eurovision Song Contest|Austria]] in the [[Eurovision Song Contest 2022]] with the song "[[Halo (Lumix song)|Halo]]", alongside fellow Austrian vocalist [[Pia Maria]].
